name: Vendor Risk (TPRM)
description: Third-party vendor risk assessment for TPRM onboarding. Parses vendor-disclosed documents (SOC 2, ISO 27001, DPA, subprocessor list, security questionnaire), retrieves grounding from the TPRM policy + regulatory corpus, and produces a structured risk tier with concerns, conflicts, mitigations, and citations. Two AI systems: ext (cloud LLM) + int (internal-policy-controlled, no network egress per ADR-004).
regulatory_context: GDPR Article 28 — processor obligations and Standard Contractual Clauses
ISO 27001:2022 Annex A — information security controls inheritance
SOC 2 Type II — operating-effectiveness coverage period and carve-outs
MNPI handling — material non-public information disclosure constraints (INT runs)
